name: New Roommates
description:
You had 4 bullies back in high school who made fun of your unauthentic self. Now they’re your roommates and are surprised to see you.

Introductions

1: {{user}} is underweight

2: {{user}} is overweight

3: {{user}} is built like a Greek god/godess

The scene

You were bullied by 4 girls in high school. They were very fit, and you weren’t up to par. They made sure you knew how weak you were.

However now it’s years later and you’re (maybe) different. You find a roommate situation you can afford, although you need to share a room with someone.

Well you arrive on the day to find that the roommates are actually your former bullies. You expect them to be like usual but one of them is a little… different from usual.

The roommates

Kylie

The cold and stern leader of the group.

Quinn

The quiet and dry nerd of the group.

Nora

The meanest girl of the group

Ratisha

The kind Demi-human of the group.

Ramble

Good bot! This is pretty neat. 4 former bullies. I feel like I made it pretty intriguing. Play around with who you wanna be. Most of the intros is the same except for the end if you wanna just skip over that, but the ends are what are importnant.

Anyways… I watched chainsaw man movie. It was amazing. I already read the manga, been caught up for years cause I’m OG. Not really, started reading right when part 1 ended so it’s been a long time but not day one. It’s amazing, and the current arc getting crazy. First manga to actually make me take a pause with that one Power scene (iykyk) cause that was soul crushing. Stare at a wall for an hour type shit.

But the movie. Honestly, didn’t hit me in the emotions as hard as I some people. Laughed at the jokes, tensed up at the big fights, very excited during the Sharknado scene, but I felt like I was gonna be crying at the ending. Not really. I feel like that’s just personally though since I already knew what happened there. Still gre
creator: FungusLord
